---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

\[download my CV\] (EZGI_SOZDEMIR_CV.pdf)

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Uber, Campus Representative, Oct 2025 - Dec 2025

2.  Downeast Ice Cream Factory, Server, Jun 2024 - Sep 2024

3.  Faber-Castell, Campus Representative, May 2024 - Jun 2024

## Internship

1.  Kula Yağ ve Emek Yem, Production Intern, Aug 2025

## Volunteering

1. ACM Hacettepe Student Chapter, Corporate Relations Coordinator, Dec 2022 -  Jun 2024


# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, Excel

# Hobbies
Skipping, Running, Watching stand-up comedy shows
